original_image_tags: Document header "STANDARD FORM NO. 64" with punch holes and black ink blots obscuring parts of the title.
Red "RECORDED-37" and "EX-177" stamps at bottom. Handwritten signature "J. Edgar Hoover" with "PERS. FILES" annotation in red ink.

elements.description: Multiple stamps and handwritten annotations at the bottom of the page. Includes a stamp reading 'RECORDED-37' and 'APR 2 0 1956', another stamp reading 'PRESS FILES', a handwritten number '62-83894-365', and other handwritten notes and signatures.

judge.reason: Description A quotes a handwritten signature 'J. Edgar Hoover' and red ink 'PERS. FILES' annotation, which are not mentioned in Description B, and Description B quotes a stamp 'APR 2 0 1956' and a handwritten number '62-83894-365' which are not mentioned in Description A, indicating the two descriptions are likely about different visual content or contain significant omissions/contradictions.
